title: Cinematic Cosmic Spacecraft Vista AI
sourceTitle: Cinematic Cosmic Spacecraft Vista AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Create a reusable cinematic cosmic spacecraft vista with controlled variables while preserving the source prompt's visual recipe. theme: A reusable cinematic cosmic spacecraft vista built around colossal interstellar ark with illuminated hull windows. signature elements: colossal interstellar ark with illuminated hull windows, swirling purple and orange nebula with dust lanes, and massive ringed planet looming in the distance must work together to create overwhelming scale layout logic: spacecraft scale, planet/nebula depth, and empty cosmic space should remain legible at first glance worldbuilding: swirling purple and orange nebula with dust lanes, massive ringed planet looming in the distance, and vibrant violet, amber, deep-space blue, and black carry the sense of distance, danger, and awe composition: stable composition, vast cosmic scale, spacecraft as the readable anchor, deep-space background layers, and cinematic negative space. style: Cinematic deep-space concept art with monumental scale, luminous nebula color, crisp spacecraft detail, and expansive science-fiction atmosphere. restrictions: no watermark, no random extra text, no distorted anatomy, no copied copyrighted composition subject: colossal interstellar ark with illuminated hull windows as the primary scale anchor against the cosmic environment scene: swirling purple and orange nebula with dust lanes and massive ringed planet looming in the distance define the depth, atmosphere, and sense of cosmic scale color palette: vibrant violet, amber, deep-space blue, and black controls the nebula, planet, spacecraft, and deep-space atmosphere without flattening cosmic contrast materials: spacecraft hull surfaces, nebula glow, planetary atmosphere, and deep-space scale cues remain crisp Keep the visual style consistent with the template while changing only the listed variables.
